name: tool-youming_5703-ppt-gener-ahzv8re6
description: Anna Executa plugin for generating .pptx files from PptxPresentationModel JSON files.
author: Anna Developer

tools.name: generatePptx
tools.description: Generate a .pptx file from a PptxPresentationModel JSON file and return the output path.

parameters.name: model_path
parameters.description: Absolute path to the PptxPresentationModel JSON file.

parameters.name: output_path
parameters.description: Absolute path where the generated .pptx file should be written.

parameters.name: cwd
parameters.description: Optional absolute working directory retained for compatibility.

tools.name: startGeneratePptx
tools.description: Start generating a .pptx file in the background and update output/generate_ppt.json.

parameters.name: model_path
parameters.description: Absolute path to the PptxPresentationModel JSON file.

parameters.name: output_path
parameters.description: Absolute path where the generated .pptx file should be written.

parameters.name: workspace_dir
parameters.description: Absolute path to the workspace containing output/generate_ppt.json.

parameters.name: job_id
parameters.description: Optional existing export job id to preserve in the status file.

parameters.name: cwd
parameters.description: Optional absolute working directory retained for compatibility.
